raw.ability details:
* [[Overhealth]] is granted immediately upon button press.
* Overhealth starts to decay 3 seconds after the ultimate ends at a rate of 50 per second.
* Removed in ''Reign of Talon Season 3: Into the Tiger's Den''

raw.official description: Reduce the cooldown of A-36 Tactical Grenade by 4 seconds when changing configurations.
raw.ability details: * Configuration: Assault refreshes the cooldown on both entering the form and leaving it. Comfiguration: Artillery only refreshes the cooldown upon leaving it.

* Applies to configurations Assault and Artillery upon their complete transformation.
* Damage reduction is applied before [[armor]].

abilities.name: Self-Repair

raw.official description: Press E to rapidly heal yourself.
raw.heal: 90 per second
raw.ability details: * Self-Repair uses a resource meter. It takes 3.3 seconds of continuous healing from full to completely deplete. ** Resource meter starts recharging 1 second after the ability is deactivated. ** It takes 6.7 seconds to recharge 100% meter (7.7s including delay). ** At least ~20% meter must be available to activate. If the meter is completely empty this takes 2.5 seconds to reach. ** If Bastion is at full health, the meter will not deplete, but regeneration is still paused if the ability is still active. * Can be activated even while not damaged, automatically healing Bastion if he takes damage. No resource will be consumed while Bastion is full HP. * Can be used in [[File:Ability-bastion2.png|middle|link=Bastion#Configuration: Assault|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Bastion#Configuration: Assault|Configuration: Assault]] but not during [[File:Artillery_Icon.png|sub|link=Bastion#Configuration: Artillery|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Bastion#Configuration: Artillery|Configuration: Artillery]]. * Self-Repair is a [[channeled]] ability; it is interrupted if Bastion uses other abilities or fires or he receives [[stunned]], [[knocked down]] or [[hacked]] [[status effect|status]].

warnings: duration has multiple values; only the first number was parsed.

raw.ability details: * Replaced by [[File:Ability-bastion2.png|middle|link=Bastion#Configuration: Assault|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Bastion#Configuration: Assault|Configuration: Assault]] in ''Overwatch 2''. * Makes Bastion immune to knock-back effects and Orisa's [[File:Ability Orisa Halt!.png|sub|link=Orisa#Halt!|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Halt!|Halt!]]. * Bastion has a glowing blue box on its back that can be hit for [[headshot]] damage. * Bastion's spread decreases continuously while firing, up to 33% after firing 40 rounds (in 1.33 seconds). * Bastion comes out of Configuration: Sentry if it is [[File:Ability Sombra Hack.png|sub|link=Sombra#Hack|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Hack|Hack]]ed, [[File:Ability-ana2.png|sub|link=Ana#Sleep Dart|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ana#Sleep Dart|slept]], [[File:Ability-reinhardt3.png|sub|link=Reinhardt#Charge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reinhardt#Charge|pinned]], [[File:Ability-Roadhog3.png|sub|link=Roadhog#Chain Hook|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Roadhog#Chain Hook|hooked]], or [[Crowd Control#Knock Down|knocked down]].

15 (direct hit bonus)
100 - 50 (splash, enemy)

raw.ability details: * Can bounce one time off the wall but cannot bounce off the ground. * The projectile can be destroyed while in air by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]], but the explosion is unaffected. * [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]] affects all damage dealt, if the projectile passes through it. Splash damage alone going through is not amplified.

abilities.name: Configuration: Artillery
shot_type: [[File:Ability-dva7.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Projectile|Projectile ]] Projectile [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.official description: Become immobile and fire up to three powerful artillery shells.
raw.duration:
8 seconds (max targeting)
1.25 seconds (impact delay)
0.18 seconds (min between shots)
raw.ability details: * The artillery shells are projectiles that can be blocked by [[barrier]]s, destroyed by D.Va's [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], Orisa's [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], Sigma's [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], Doomfist's [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and Mizuki's [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and deflected with Genji's [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]] on the way down. ** The initial animation, where Bastion fires the shots upwards, is only a visual effect and does not produce projectiles that can be interacted with in any way. * Bastion can use secondary fire (right click) to switch to a top-down view.'"`UNIQ--ref-0000005F-QINU`"' * Target location becomes visible to enemy 0.6 seconds before the shell lands. * The first line represents the start of damage falloff. The thicker line at the middle is drawn approximately at 2.5 meter radius, representing ~190 damage. * Bastion cannot crouch while in Configuration: Artillery.

duration.raw:
8 seconds (max targeting)
1.25 seconds (impact delay)
0.18 seconds (min between shots)
